title: Rivendell 2026 Appaloosa Presale Launches Today at Noon PST
content:
Rivendell‘s bikes sell like hot cakes these days. Today, the Walnut Creek company is opening up its pre-order for its all-rounder 2026 Joe Appaloosa frame ($1,800). It’s 100 percent perfect for 90 percent of the riding you’re likely going to do, and 90 percent perfect for the other ten percent. Ideal for tires between 1.5 inches and 2.2 inches.

Specs:

  • 650b wheels in sizes 46 and 51 cm
  • 700c wheels in sizes 54 cm and up
  • Cantilever or V brakes. Get V-brakes
  • 26.8 mm seat post, not included.
  • 135 mm rear spacing
  • 1″ threaded fork – headset included
  • If you’re using cantis, OK, but you’ll need some cable hangers

Check out more at Rivendell.

The post Rivendell 2026 Appaloosa Presale Launches Today at Noon PST appeared first on The Radavist.
author: John Watson
